ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property being analyzed (e.g., 'as important source of history') */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the property is derived (e.g., Quasimodo, ConceptNet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated property */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., Plausible, Typical, Remarkable) */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Numerical value of the score */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the score (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the score type (e.g., Plausible, Typical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the score type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the score type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the score type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semantic_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the semantic analysis */,
  "analysis_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semantic_analysis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semantic_analysis_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semantic_analysis_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated analysis */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_metadata_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES semantic_analysis ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_metadata_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
